prompt: Generate a computer graphics visual for object detection: Display the yellow sports car from image 1, set against the black background of image 2, overlaid with a dynamic bounding box and detection confidence label.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics image demonstrating object detection. The central subject is the yellow convertible sports car from image 1, positioned against a pure black background consistent with image 2. Overlay the car with a crisp, vibrant green bounding box. Inside or immediately adjacent to the bounding box, include a clear white text label, such as 'Sports Car: 98% Confidence'.
objects: crisp, vibrant green bounding box (overlaying the car)
clear white text label "Sports Car: 98% Confidence" (inside or immediately adjacent to the bounding box)
